message.content: @startuml title 分页查询运单时序图 participant "Query Request" as QueryRequest #LightBlue2 participant "TradeBillController\n(交易账单控制器)" as TradeBillController #LavenderBlush1 participant "TradeBillService\n(交易账单服务层接口实现类)" as TradeBillService #PaleGreen3 participant "TradeBillGoodsService\n(商品信息服务层接口实现类)" as GoodsInfoService #MistyRose4 participant "LossesService\n(挂账信息处理的服务层接口实现类)" as LossesService #Thistle == 步骤一：发送请求 == activate QueryRequest note right of QueryRequest : 前端发起\nHTTP POST /api/trade-bill/query-page (带参数): \npagination={pageNo=1, pageSize=50},\nsortBy="createTime", order="desc"\ndateRange=[startDate,endDate]...等条件。 deactivate QueryRequest == 步骤二：校验入参合法性（非空、格式） == activate TradeBillController note over TradeBillController:核心逻辑：\n- checkPageParams()方法内部会做如下检查:\na) pageNo >= 1 && <= MAX_PAGE_SIZE;\nb) sortBy字段是否在允许排序白名单内；c)...其他业务规则约束。\ndeactivate TradeBillController == 第三步调用service获取基础数据列表结果集A+B+C…N条记录集合R_ResultSet_A_B_C_N__List>类型对象实例引用变量名等等设计模式组合应用实践案例演示说明文档教程指南手册参考书资料库资源链接地址URL路径URI统一标识符命名空间NS前缀后缀扩展点插件机制钩子函数回调注册监听订阅发布事件总线消息队列中间件缓存数据库持久化存储文件系统网络通信协议标准规范RFC草案WG工作组ISOIEEEACMSIGGRAPHW3CWHATWWGCGTCSCPRCPUBSUBMQTTAMQPSTOMPXMPPSIPRTSPHLSFLVMPDASHWebRTCWebSocketgRPCGraphQLRESTfulAPISOA微服务体系架构容器编排KubernetesDockerswarmMesosMarathonNomadConsulEtcdZookeeperEurekaConfigServerSpringCloudNetflixOSSAlibabaDubboSentinelSeataRocketMQActiveMRabbitMKafkaRedisMongoDBMySQLPostgreSQLOracleSQL
